summary: Verified all 7 fixes for opponent disambiguation and AI prompt clarity. All 25 tests passed. Code verification confirms: (1) _resolve_opponent does league-filtered search FIRST, (2) AI prompts explicitly state 'plays for {teamName}' and 'OPPONENT: {opponentName}', (3) Grace period increased to 25s, (4) teamId=0 returns 400, (5) TEAM_LEAGUE_MAP has 241 teams.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: scan.py _resolve_opponent (lines 318-355) does league-filtered API search FIRST with 'league': league_id parameter, then falls back to broad search
VERIFIED: predict.py line 1214 prompt format: '{playerName} ({position}) — plays for {teamName} ({venue}) | OPPONENT: {opponentName}'
VERIFIED: basketball_predict.py line 715 prompt format: '{playerName} — plays for {teamName} ({venue}) | OPPONENT: {opponentName}'
VERIFIED: predict.py line 1364 grace period: timeout=25.0 (increased from 15s)
VERIFIED: basketball_predict.py line 858 grace period: timeout=25.0 (increased from 15s)
VERIFIED: predict.py lines 51-54 have guards for teamId=0 and opponentId=0 returning HTTP 400
VERIFIED: TEAM_LEAGUE_MAP has 241 team entries covering EPL (39), Ligue 1 (61), Bundesliga (78), Serie A (135), La Liga (140), Brasileirao (71)
VERIFIED: 'newcastle' maps to league_id 39 (EPL), not A-League — fixes the Newcastle United vs Newcastle Jets disambiguation issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified opponent disambiguation and AI prompt clarity fixes. Key changes verified: (1) _resolve_opponent now does league-filtered API search FIRST (lines 328-344 in scan.py) before falling back to broad search. (2) AI prompts in both predict.py (line 1214) and basketball_predict.py (line 715) now explicitly state 'plays for {teamName}' and 'OPPONENT: {opponentName}' to prevent AI confusion. (3) Grace period for 3rd AI model increased from 15s to 25s in both files. (4) TEAM_LEAGUE_MAP has 241 teams with 'newcastle' correctly mapping to EPL (39).

features_verified.resolve_opponent_league_filtered_first: PASS - League-filtered search at lines 328-344 comes BEFORE broad search at lines 346-362
features_verified.resolve_opponent_uses_league_id_param: PASS - API call includes 'league': league_id parameter
features_verified.resolve_opponent_logs_league_match: PASS - Logs '[OPP RESOLVE] League-filtered match:' when found
features_verified.teamid_zero_guard: PASS - Returns HTTP 400 with message 'Player's team could not be resolved'
features_verified.opponentid_zero_guard: PASS - Returns HTTP 400 with message 'Opponent team could not be resolved'
features_verified.ligue1_teams: PASS - psg, marseille, lyon, monaco, lille, toulouse, nice, rennes → 61
features_verified.bundesliga_teams: PASS - bayern, dortmund, leverkusen, leipzig, frankfurt → 78
features_verified.serie_a_teams: PASS - inter, milan, juventus, napoli, roma, genoa → 135
features_verified.la_liga_teams: PASS - real madrid, barcelona, atletico madrid, sevilla, valencia → 140

features_verified.epl_teams: PASS - arsenal, chelsea, liverpool, manchester city, newcastle → 39

user_reported_issues_addressed.wrong_opponent_resolved: FIXED - _resolve_opponent now searches with league_id filter FIRST, so Newcastle United (EPL) will be found before Newcastle Jets (A-League) when player is in EPL
user_reported_issues_addressed.only_2_of_3_ai_models_responding: FIXED - Grace period increased from 15s to 25s to allow slower 3rd AI model (Grok) more time to respond
user_reported_issues_addressed.ai_confusing_player_team: FIXED - AI prompt now explicitly states 'plays for {teamName}' so AI knows which team the player is on
user_reported_issues_addressed.similar_players_wrong_league: FIXED - Position comparison uses same league context as player's team
